response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, Python-adjacent JS/TS), and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Proven ability to design and ship cross-team tools (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD infrastructure).
Strong data and systems thinking evidenced by performance optimization, telemetry-like work, and statistical workshops.
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout automation systems.
Lacks demonstrable experience with AI tools accelerating engineering velocity or AI-first growth systems.
Experience with metrics, guardrails, and statistical analysis is implied but not explicitly documented in context of growth platforms.
